description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is broad and flat, with a uniform width along most of its length before narrowing at the tip. The crossguard is simple and angular, extending horizontally to provide hand protection. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be wrapped or textured for grip, ending in a faceted pommel. The entire object is rendered in a uniform dark blue color, giving it a modern, minimalistic appearance. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements on any part of the sword.
description: A stylized, double-edged sword with a straight blade, angular crossguard, and a textured cylindrical handle, all in dark blue.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the straight blade, angular crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edge of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured or wrapped, faceted pommel
